creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 212055
tealdeer-1.3.0.diff

Changes:
	* Bump DISTVERSION to 1.3.0, update distinfo and CARGO_CRATES
	  dependency list;
	* Add zsh shell completion file to PLIST_FILES and post install
	  target;
	* Suppress output of MKDIR in doc install target. 


Testing:
	* No errors reported with portlint, built in Poudriere and
	  application works as expected (logs attached).
